content: Staging is live with v2 API. What's the status on regression testing? Anything blocking you?
What's your test user ID? I need it to flip the checkout_v2 flag on.

On staging seed: the migration ran clean on my end, but if fixture data is missing, that's likely infra/seed maintenance — QA, is this your area or should we pull in infra? On refund endpoint: `/v2/refunds` is wired and integration-tested. Ready for you to write regression cases.
Release strategy clarified: Feature-flag rollout (not hard cutover Friday). Adjust test plan from cutover validation to ramp validation. See release_strategy_clarification.md.

Staging seed is my domain. Backend migration broke it. I'm fixing it today — ETA by EOD (6 hours). Will push updated seed script and staging DB refresh so you can run full regression suite. Confirm when you see fixture users and promo_codes table populated.
Yes, refund endpoint is locked. `/v2/refunds` is wired with integration tests passing. Write your 8 regression test cases now — no further changes expected.
